what_changed:
• Fixed Windows link error for UpdateManager::usesSnapStore().
• Fixed video stream proxy: real Content-Length, follow Immich CDN redirects without forwarding the API key, longer timeout — stops FFmpeg/GStreamer aborting on open.
• Snap defaults to GStreamer media backend (FFmpeg was SIGABRT in avformat_open_input); hover video preview disabled under Snap.
• Settings → Appearance shows local cache size.
• Snap-aware update UI strings when running from Snap.
• Added Flatpak packaging for Flathub using App ID io.github.hdmain.immich-desktop (Flathub rejects com.github.* for new apps).
• Build and publish Linux/Snap packages for arm64 as well as amd64 (GitHub releases + Snap Store).
